inline_comments.message: I'm assuming that this value is taken from the properties file if it exists? But how does spring know which .properties file to read from?

That's right.   The main application.properties has an attribute called spring.profiles.active.  If gizmo appears in the list of active profiles spring will inject the properties in that file into beans in the "gizmo" profile group.

In the above spring-beans definition you'll notice that the sparky-gizmo.xml beans declaration has a new attribute called profile and it's tagged with "gizmo".  

Spring will only instantiate the beans in this group if the gizmo profile is in the active list.
